name: Chilled Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill the oranges until they are cold.
2. Cut the chilled oranges into wedges.
3. Combine an equal amount of ground cinnamon and granulated sugar in a bowl.
4. Roll each orange wedge in the cinnamon-sugar mixture, ensuring it is evenly coated.
5. Enjoy your spiced oranges! For extra sweetness, add more sugar than cinnamon to the mixture.
